author: lOrm
content: Fixed via src/hooks/mod.rs::fire_post_tool: replaced 'let _ = self.run(event, &input).await' with capturing the HookResult and iterating result.errors, emitting tracing::error! per error with structured event=, tool=, session_id=, hook_error_index=, error= fields. Caller remains fire-and-forget (errors not propagated). Regression tests: fire_post_tool_surfaces_hook_errors_via_tracing_error (forces a HookError::Denied via empty allowlist, asserts ERROR log captured with tool=bash, session_id=Some(sess-778), and 'denied by allowlist'); fire_post_tool_silent_when_hooks_succeed (happy-path counter-test, asserts no ERROR log). OWASP A09 audit trail now records the failure even though the synchronous caller cannot. cargo test --lib: 1510 passed. cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings: exit 0.
